name: claude-mem-20260316
description: Context-compression brain inspired by claude-mem's three-layer retrieval. Emphasizes L0/L1/L2 progressive disclosure and token-optimized context assembly.

working.description: Hot state with L0 compression. Tool outputs stored as L2, context gets L0 summaries.

knowledge.description: Persistent knowledge with L1 summaries. Each lesson has a full entry (L2) and a one-line summary (L0).

episodic.description: Compressed long-term memory. Daily logs are auto-summarized.

features.l0_summaries: Heuristic one-line summaries for tool outputs (already implemented in conversation.py)
features.context_compression: SessionContext._trim() compresses old tool outputs outside freshness window
features.l2_store: Full tool outputs retained in working/tool_outputs/ for on-demand retrieval
